channel.title: Preventative
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from Preventative, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Where Women Live Impacts Their Health: Here Are The 10 Best States
item.description: Where a woman lives plays a critical role in her health outcomes. It shapes her access to healthcare, safety, and overall quality of life. A new analy...

item.description: By JEFF BRANDES To say healthcare’s safety net experienced tectonic shifts in 2025 would be an understatement. The rapid introduction of multiple and ...

item.description: Republicans have said new rules requiring many Medicaid participants to work 80 hours a month will pinpoint unemployed young people who should have jo...

item.title: 6 Really Good Reasons To Actually Take A Lunch Break Today
item.description: Why nutrition and mental health experts think we should do away with sad desk salads.

item.title: Forget 10,000 Steps — This Smaller Number Can Still Boost Heart Health
item.description: BRB: Just taking a few more loops around the block

item.title: Is Your Skin Dehydrated? Look For These Kinds Of Fine Lines
item.description: Plus, how to deal.

item.title: 3 Must-Do Steps If You Want To Avoid Dark Spots & Fine Lines
item.description: Here, how to keep your skin healthy and still enjoy that precious sunshine.

item.title: Busy Brain Keeping You From Falling Asleep? 4 Tips To Help, From A PhD
item.description: Better sleep is just a few steps away.

item.title: End of Enhanced Obamacare Subsidies Puts Tribal Health Lifeline at Risk
item.description: Tribal insurance programs give Native Americans access to affordable health care when the Indian Health Service falls short. Those plans are threatene...

item.title: Trust No One

item.title: Managing Chronic Hives That Come Out of Nowhere

item.title: 10 Things Black and Brown Women Need to Know About Heart Disease
item.description: Heart disease is the leading cause of death for Black and Brown women—yet many don’t know their unique risks. These ten facts highlight what every wom...

item.title: Listen to the Latest ‘KFF Health News Minute’
item.description: The "KFF Health News Minute” brings original health care and health policy reporting from our newsroom to the airwaves each week.

item.title: ​What Is Primary Hyperoxaluria?
item.description: Primary hyperoxaluria (PH) is not just one disease but rather a group of three rare genetic disorders : PH1, PH2 and PH3. They are linked to different...
